title: 30W LED Work Light Rechargeable COB Battery Floodlight Super Bright 2000LM Portable Outdoor Security Flood Light USB Lamp Waterproof for Camping Garage Hiking Fishing Garden
features: 3 Lighting Modes and 2 Ways to Power :High brightness, low brightness, and SOS flash, meeting your different lighting needs. Power by 2x rechargeable batteries via USB cable or 4 x AA batteries.

Super Bright & Good Battery Life: The Brightest 30W Floodlight in market. The work light brightness equal to the 200W halogen bulb, save 80% on electric lighting. Discharge Time : Full Brightness last for 5 hours once full charge, the low brightness (9 hours).

2 Years Warranty & 100% Customer Satisfaction- We are offering a FREE 24-months guarantee with every purchase ! If it breaks within 24 months of your purchase, we will replace it for you! Customer 100% satisfaction is paramount to us.

IP65 Waterproof & Flexible Stand: The handheld spotlight range is adjustable, non-slip handle well protects your hands, and you can handle it for home projects, garages, Barbecue, travel, camping, fishing, warehouses, craftsman, Workshops, repair car or emergency light.

As a USB Power Bank: with USB charging port & Micro USB Discharge, our rechargeable work lamp can be used as an emergency power to charge your mobile Phone / Computer. No need to take out the battery to charge, very convenient and fast.
description: Product Description Powerful 30W LED Rechargeable LED Work Light High Brightness and Good Quality LED Work Light Specifications: Wattage: 30W Brightness: 2000 Lumens, replace 200W traditional halogen bulb by 30W COB lights, which can effectively save electricity. Water Resistant IP65 With IP65 protection rating, our rechargeable work light can work well in rainy day or snowy days.
